2603.17826.title: FailureMem: A Failure-Aware Multimodal Framework for Autonomous Software Repair
2603.17826.paper_summary: Multimodal Automated Program Repair (MAPR) extends traditional program repair by requiring models to jointly reason over source code, textual issue descriptions, and visual artifacts such as GUI screenshots. While recent LLM-based repair systems have shown promising results, existing approaches face several limitations: rigid workflow pipelines restrict exploration during debugging, visual reasoning is often performed over full-page screenshots without localized grounding, and failed repair attempts are rarely transformed into reusable knowledge. To address these challenges, we propose FailureMem, a multimodal repair framework that integrates three key mechanisms: a hybrid workflow-agent architecture that balances structured localization with flexible reasoning, active perception tools that enable region-level visual grounding, and a Failure Memory Bank that converts past repair attempts into reusable guidance. Experiments on SWE-bench Multimodal demonstrate FailureMem improves the resolved rate over GUIRepair by 3.7%.
2603.17826.paper_summary_zh: 多模態自動程式修復（MAPR）擴展了傳統的程式修復，要求模型共同推理源代碼、文本問題描述以及視覺物件，如 GUI 截圖。雖然最近基於 LLM 的修復系統顯示出有希望的結果，但現有的方法面臨幾個限制：僵化的工作流程管道限制了調試過程中的探索，視覺推理通常是在整個頁面的截圖上進行，而沒有局部的基礎，且失敗的修復嘗試很少轉化為可重用的知識。為了解決這些挑戰，我們提出了 FailureMem，一個多模態修復框架，整合了三個關鍵機制：一種混合工作流代理架構，平衡結構化定位與靈活推理，主動感知工具使得區域級別的視覺基礎成為可能，以及一個失敗記憶庫，將過去的修復嘗試轉化為可重用的指導。在 SWE-bench Multimodal 上的實驗表明，FailureMem 對 GUIRepair 的解決率提高了 3.7%。
2603.17826.author: Ruize Ma et.al.
2603.17826.authors: Ruize Ma, Yilei Jiang, Shilin Zhang, Zheng Ma, Yi Feng, Vincent Ng, Zhi Wang, Xiangyu Yue, Chuanyi Li, Lewei Lu
